name: calendar-shortcuts
title: Calendar Shortcuts
description: Optional keyboard shortcuts dialog for documenting the built-in grid and event key bindings.
docs: Install with `npx shadcn@latest add https://calendarcn.phantomtechind.com/r/calendar-core.json https://calendarcn.phantomtechind.com/r/calendar-shortcuts.json` and import the dialog from `@/components/calendar/addons/shortcuts/dialog`.
